name: Emergia Inc.
summary: Emergia Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, development, and management of real estate properties in Canada, the United States, and Greece. Its portfolio includes retail, residential, office, and industrial properties. The company was formerly known as The Delma Group Inc. and changed its name to Emergia Inc. in January 2020. Emergia Inc. is headquartered in Dorval, Canada.
